en_body:
While waiting for You:
 I use the letters
 to
 write prose, make poetry
 praising You
While waiting for You:
 I choose each
 color of ink
 inscribing with
 curving strokes
 straight lines
 exalting
 the space
 embalmed by
 trembling remembrance
 my love
 for You
While waiting for You:
 I am absorbed
 watching, searching
 for the sound from
 Your sobbing Soul

 therefore
While waiting for You:
 I forget my song
 because I am so busy
 listening, waiting
 for Your voice
 within
 the beating
 of
 the heart
 that
 belongs to
...You..!!

(Thursday, 20/09/2007)

While Waiting For Your Return
